title: RelBench rel-avito Dataset: FK Links, Cardinality Stats & Parent-Child Feature Matrices
summary: Demo notebook that loads pre-computed aligned parent-child feature pairs from the RelBench rel-avito dataset (NeurIPS 2024 benchmark). Explores 8 tables (~20.7M rows) from the Avito ad platform, analyzes 11 FK links with cardinality statistics (mean/median/max/p95/std), parses parent-child feature vectors, computes R² scores, and visualizes cardinality distributions, table sizes, feature dimensionality, and cross-link correlations. Uses 88 curated examples across all 11 FK links.
